title: RankShop
description: A rank shop plugin with a economy feature added.
body:
A secondary non-transfer,non-tradable currency directly hook with Luckperms with PlaceholderAPI. This plugin is useful for those people who wants to make rank shop with different non-tradable currency.
It has customisable config.yml.(currency name is changeable).

In config.yml if u want to change rank then please change key to that rank name too.

![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1ac155d4f76a9b9e2ebbe1d2484650680f461cc.jpeg)

## **Features:**
Placeholders supported       
No vault required                
Direct hook with Luckperms                
Untradable currency              
Custom currency                                      
Paper & Spigot supported

![Dependencies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/300def3e0a60eef626d31300de06e6c525cd2c44.jpeg)

## **Dependencies:**
Paper or Spigot 1.21.X, Luckperms, PlaceHolderAPI

##  **Commands:**
/rankshop: opens rank shop gui
/rankshopbal: admin command to add,remove,set currency balance

##  **PlaceHolderAPI:**
%rankshop_balance%: current balance of player

##  **Permissions:**
rankshop.open: open rankshop
rankshop.admin: admin permission to add balance
